name: P90 | 往日行动
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. It has been custom painted with a CT from the main menu of the original Counter-Strike. Minutes to install but a lifetime to master
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装，表面喷绘着经典版本CS主页面的反恐精英。 安装只要几分钟，但值得用一生去精通。
